══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Fairy — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Fairy — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Fairy — Armored Escapist
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 20] CRITICAL HIT! 31 damage. Fairy — Armored Escapist HP: 28/59
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Fairy — Armored Escapist --- HP: 28/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:2+4=6 vs DC 15] FAIL. Still paralyzed.

══ ROUND 5 ══
--- Fairy — Armored Escapist --- HP: 28/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:8+4=12 vs DC 15] FAIL! 4 psychic damage. HP: 174/178
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 174/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Fairy — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Fairy — Armored Escapist
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 20] CRITICAL HIT! 21 damage. Fairy — Armored Escapist HP: 7/59
→ Concentration save: [d20:7+3=10 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 20] MISS.
══ ROUND 6 ══
--- Fairy — Armored Escapist --- HP: 7/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (7/59). Going invisible for survival.
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Fairy — Armored Escapist is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 174/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Fairy — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Fairy — Armored Escapist
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 20] HIT! 20 damage. Fairy — Armored Escapist HP: -13/59
→ Concentration save: [d20:9+3=12 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
